overall.description: A slow aerial drone shot over misty coastal waters at dawn, revealing a rocky shoreline and a distant house. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine with cinematic fog and atmospheric lighting effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal waters with distant shoreline

events.description: large marine creature surfaces briefly in the water ahead

agents.ego_description: drifting slowly over calm water toward the distant shoreline

entered.detail: fog-covered horizon line blending sea and sky
bright sun diffused through heavy morning fog
rocky headland barely visible through the mist

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a slow drift over calm, foggy waters at dawn. The sun glows faintly through the mist while a distant cliff line is visible to the right. A large marine creature briefly breaks the surface around the 11-second mark.

events.description: camera turns left toward the shoreline revealing wooden posts in the water

agents.ego_description: turning toward the shore while maintaining low altitude over water

entered.detail: dark rocky coast emerging from the mist
weathered wooden posts sticking out of the water

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left toward the shore, revealing a rocky coastline and wooden posts protruding from the water. The mist remains thick as the perspective shifts from open water to the coastal edge.

agents.ego_description: moving closer to the rocky shoreline with grassy vegetation

entered.detail: steep cliff face covered in green grass and shrubs
silhouettes of trees visible through the fog on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Moving along the water's edge, the camera approaches a grassy cliff with scattered trees visible through the mist. The rocky shoreline draws closer while the wooden posts disappear behind.

events.description: wooden house becomes visible on the cliff top through the mist

agents.ego_description: approaching the shore where a house sits atop the rocky cliff

entered.detail: traditional wooden house with dark roof perched on the cliff

segments.scene_description: A wooden house emerges from the fog atop the cliff as the camera continues its approach. The shoreline becomes more defined with rocks and vegetation clearly visible.

events.description: abandoned vehicle wreck becomes visible on the rocky shore

agents.ego_description: closing in on the rocky shore where a vehicle sits near the water's edge

notable_agents.action: abandoned vehicle wreck resting on the rocky shore near the water

entered.detail: damaged vehicle lying on its side on the rocky beach

segments.scene_description: In the final approach to shore, an abandoned vehicle wreck becomes visible on the rocks. The wooden house recedes into the background mist as the camera focuses on the shoreline debris.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial drift across misty coastal waters that gradually reveals a rugged shoreline and its abandoned remnants. It begins with a slow glide over calm, foggy waters at dawn, where a faint sun glows through the mist and a large marine creature briefly breaks the surface. As the camera turns left, the open water shifts toward a rocky coastline marked by wooden posts protruding from the tide. The perspective then moves along the water's edge toward a grassy cliff with scattered trees, allowing a wooden house to emerge from the fog atop the heights. Finally, the camera focuses on the shoreline debris as an abandoned vehicle wreck becomes visible on the rocks, while the house recedes back into the atmospheric mist.
